Headline: General Updates
Description: Essar Shipping Limited has informed the Exchange clarification in response to the deficiency observed in the Financial Results, submitted as an Outcome of the Board Meeting dated August 13, 2025, We, Essar Shipping Limited (the Company), submit the following:The Un-Audited Consolidated and Standalone Financial Results for the Quarter Ended June 30, 2025, as approved by the Board of Director at their Meeting, were signed by Mr. Rajesh Desai, Executive Director of the Company, who is duly authorised by the Board of Directors, to do so. Please find enclosed the certified true extracts of the Resolutions passed by the Board of Directors, at their Meeting held on August 13, 2025, as Annexure to this clarification.We confirm that the signing of the aforementioned Financial Results were in due compliance with Regulation 33 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.Request you to kindly take this response on your records and oblige.

Headline: Demise
Description: With deep grief and intense sorrow, we hereby inform about the sad and untimely demise of Mr. Vimal Jain, Chief Financial Officer of the Bank on September 10, 2025. Vimal Ji, as he was fondly referred to, was associated with the Bank since 2010 and was a pillar of strength for the Bank and the Finance and Accounts function, playing a crucial leadership role throughout his 15+ years of career with the Bank. He was a deeply loved and admired leader whose perseverance, keen learning aptitude, and exemplary leadership capabilities paved the way for his emergence as a credible and respected banker. The Bank immensely benefitted from his vision and leadership during his tenure. The strong team created by him in Finance and Accounts will carry forward his vision and legacy with commitment as a true tribute to him. Mr. Vimal Jain s sudden and unexpected passing away today morning due to a cardiac arrest will be an irreparable loss to the Bank and his presence will be deeply missed. The Bank expresses deep sympathy and condolences to his family. The Bank is initiating necessary steps for interim succession and will update the regulators in due course regarding any further developments, as required under applicable RBI and SEBI regulations.
